bead.title: Document pre-claim intake contract, failure-class mapping, and silent-idle diagnosis in README
bead.description:
PROBLEM
Operators have no documented contract for the pre-claim intake, no mapping of failure classes (warn-only vs operator-attention escalation vs hard error), and no playbook for diagnosing silent-idle on a full queue. During the Fizeau idle, the warn payload's suggested_action ("check the readiness route or harness configuration and retry") actively misdirected the operator: the real fault was DDx's own decoder, not the route or harness config.

ROOT CAUSE
The README lacks a pre-claim intake section, so the readiness_checks verdict forms, the failure-class mapping, the warn-fingerprint escalation threshold, the claim-rate window flags, and the silent-idle diagnosis steps are undocumented.

PROPOSED FIX (parent AC5)
Add a "Pre-claim Intake and Silent-Idle Diagnosis" section to README.md documenting: (a) the readiness_checks contract including the canonical verdict forms (bool/string/null); (b) the failure-class mapping warn-only -> operator-attention -> hard error; (c) the consecutive-warn-fingerprint escalation threshold and the --claim-rate-window / --claim-rate-threshold flags; (d) a step-by-step silent-idle diagnosis playbook (how to tell a stuck full queue from a legitimately empty one via the agent-loop log and status surfaces).

DEPENDS ON
All four code children (decoder coercion, schema lock, warn-fingerprint escalation, claim-rate window) must land first so the documented contract, flags, and thresholds match shipped behavior.

NON-SCOPE
- Any code changes to the decoder, schema, loop, or CLI (covered by the four sibling code children this depends on).

CROSS-REF
Governing artifact: AR-2026-05-17 follow-up beads. Adjacent silent-failure bugs documented alongside: ddx-57c40485, ddx-8f2e0ebf.
bead.acceptance:
1. README.md contains a pre-claim intake section documenting the readiness_checks contract (verdict bool/string/null), the failure-class mapping (warn-only vs operator-attention vs hard error), the warn-fingerprint escalation threshold, the --claim-rate-window/--claim-rate-threshold flags, and a silent-idle diagnosis playbook; verified by TestReadmeDocumentsPreClaimIntakeContract in cli/cmd/readme_preclaim_intake_test.go.
2. cd cli && go test ./cmd/... green.
3. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
